class.name: GDKStoreLicenseStatus
class.brief_description: Typed wrapper for XStore license-acquire status.
class.description: Represents one license status record returned by [method GDKStore.query_license_status_async] or [method GDKStore.refresh_entitlements_async]. The addon copies [code]store_id[/code], [code]licensable_sku[/code], and the raw native [code]XStoreCanAcquireLicenseResult.status[/code] integer into this wrapper without remapping the status value.

method.name: get_store_id
method.description: Returns the queried Store product ID.

method.name: get_licensable_sku
method.description: Returns the SKU string reported by XStore for this result.

method.name: get_status
method.description: Returns the raw [code]XStoreCanAcquireLicenseResult.status[/code] value as an integer.

members.member: Store product ID used for the query.
